name: Peanut Pie with Shortbread-Cookie Crust
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces peanut butter cookies, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Grind the shortbread cookies in a food processor until finely ground. Add the peanut butter and continue to process until all of the cookie crumbs are moistened with peanut butter. Press the mixture into a 9-inch pie pan, forming a thicker edge near the rim. Bake for 6 minutes. Remove pie shell and reduce oven temperature to 350 degrees.
3. Meanwhile, mix the brown sugar, corn syrup, flour, eggs, and vanilla in a bowl just until blended. Stir in the chopped peanut butter cookies and the peanuts. Pour into the partially baked pie shell and return to the oven to bake for about 45 minutes, until the top is browned but the filling is still gooey in the center. Cool on a rack for at least an hour before serving.
